title: Multi-Chain Token Aggregator
description: Aggregate all token balances across every chain a wallet is active on — auto-discovers active chains then fetches balances in parallel. One function call for a complete cross-chain portfolio.
useCase: Build a complete cross-chain token dashboard that automatically discovers active chains and aggregates all token holdings — no hard-coded chain list needed.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to aggregate tokens across all chains
